channel.title: Projects on Boris Rapoport — Automation & QA Leadership
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Boris Rapoport — Automation & QA Leadership

item.title: MTG Scorekeeper
item.description:
A clean, lightweight web app for tracking game state during Magic: The Gathering matches. Keeps tabs on life totals, poison counters, and other game metrics without the complexity of full arena clients.

Built from scratch to solve a specific problem: you need something fast and simple when you’re actively playing. No account required, no ads, just the essentials.

Try the Live Demo → | View the Code →

item.title: Home Lab and Infrastructure
item.description:
A self-hosted server setup that runs everything from virtualization to home automation. Powers personal experiments with infrastructure, automation scripts, and cutting-edge tools like OpenClaw. Purely internal—the backbone of how I manage my digital environment.

Why it matters: Building and maintaining your own infrastructure teaches you what enterprise teams worry about. It’s also cheaper and more flexible than cloud-only solutions.
